data.name: HomeTagline
data.value: Rebuild the Utopia Engine before the world ends.

data.name: ConstructFoundPerfect
data.value: {0} found and activated (perfect zero, +5 God's Hand energy)!

data.name: MustFight
data.value: You must fight {0} (attack on {1}, hit on {2}{3}).

data.name: WandApplied
data.value: Paralysis wand: +{0} to both dice for the whole fight, now {1} and {2}.

data.name: EventsRolled
data.value: New events unfold across the regions!

data.name: GameLostTime
data.value: time has caught up with you

data.name: UnconsciousMsg
data.value: Unconscious! You wake up after {0} day(s), healed.

data.name: FocusCharmUsed
data.value: Focus charm: +2 energy on this activation.

data.name: SurplusToGodsHand
data.value: The surplus ({0}) charges the God's Hand.

data.name: ExhaustedActivation
data.value: Both attempts spent: the construct activates anyway, exhausted.

data.name: AttemptFailed
data.value: Attempt failed ({0} energy of 4 required): +1 day, moving on to the second table.

data.name: LinksSummary
data.value: {0} link(s) of {1} — current final activation difficulty: {2}

data.name: LinkNeedsActivated
data.value: Unavailable — both constructs must be activated

data.name: ConnectHint
data.value: Goal: low-difference columns, never negative — the sum of the link values sets the final activation difficulty.

data.name: AutoConnected
data.value: Link made automatically thanks to the Ancient Texts (value {0}).

data.name: LinkFailedReset
data.value: No components left to compensate: the link is reset, start over.

data.name: DiedToLinkBacklash
data.value: you succumb to the link's backlash

data.name: FinalIntro
data.value: The six constructs are linked: the Utopia Engine is ready. Roll 2d6 — reach or exceed the difficulty to save the world. Each failure costs 1 HP and 1 day.

data.name: SacrificeDone
data.value: You channel your life force: −{0} HP, difficulty reduced by as much. There will be no second sacrifice.

data.name: FinalFail
data.value: The Engine rumbles but does not start: −1 HP, +1 day.

data.name: Victory
data.value: THE UTOPIA ENGINE AWAKENS — the world is saved!

data.name: SkullsFmt
data.value: Skulls crossed: {0}/{1} (each skull = +1 day of deadline)

data.name: SkullCrossed
data.value: The God's Hand strikes: a skull is crossed, +1 day of deadline.

data.name: RestHint
data.value: Rest: recover 1 HP per day spent.

data.name: HelpGoalBody
data.value: You are the last artificer. Find the six constructs buried in the six regions, activate them, link them together, then attempt the final activation of the Utopia Engine before the world ends. You lose if time runs out or if your hit points drop below zero.

data.name: HelpTimeBody
data.value: Almost everything costs days: searching an already-searched region, resting, failing an activation… You start with 15 days. Each crossed skull (via the God's Hand) extends the deadline by one day, up to 8 skulls. Some days are event days: new events are rolled randomly across the regions and modify searching or fighting while active.

data.name: HelpSearchBody
data.value: Each region holds 6 search boxes of 6 cells (3 top, 3 bottom). Roll two dice and place each one in a free cell; reroll until the box is full. The top row forms a 3-digit number, so does the bottom row: the search result is the difference (top − bottom). The art is putting the right digits in the right places!

data.name: HelpResultsBody
data.value: • 0 (perfect zero): the region's construct is found AND activated immediately, +5 God's Hand energy. • 1 to 10: the construct is found (if already found: 2 components instead). • 11 to 99: 1 component from the region. • Negative or 100 and above: a monster attacks! The more extreme the result, the stronger the monster (level 1 to 5: ±100 → lvl 2, ±200 → lvl 3, ±300 → lvl 4, ±400/500 → lvl 5).

data.name: HelpCombatBody
data.value: Each turn, roll two dice. Every die at or below the monster's attack value costs you 1 HP; a die at or above its hit value kills it. A defeated monster may drop loot: a component, or the region's legendary treasure for a level-5 monster. At 0 HP you fall unconscious: 6 days lost (4 with the Healing Horn), then HP restored. Below 0 HP, you are dead.

data.name: HelpItemsBody
data.value: Three once-per-game items: • Dowsing rod: add or subtract up to 100 from a search result. • Paralysis wand: +2 to both dice for the rest of the current fight (decided after seeing the roll). • Focus charm: helps when activating a construct. Each item still charged at game end is worth 10 points.

data.name: HelpGodshandBody
data.value: An energy gauge fed by perfect zeros and certain powers. Spend 3 energy to cross a skull: +1 day on the deadline and +5 points.

data.name: HelpConstructsBody
data.value: A found construct must be activated: place dice on its 4-column table. A completed column whose difference (top − bottom) is ±5 yields 2 energy, ±4 yields 1, 0 clears the column (redo it), any other difference locks it and costs 1 HP. You need 4 energy to activate; any surplus charges the God's Hand. A failed table costs 1 day and grants a second table — if that one fails too, the construct activates anyway, exhausted. Activated constructs are then linked in pairs (six links, a 3-column table each). Starting a link costs 1 component. A column whose bottom exceeds its top costs 1 HP and 1 extra component (otherwise the whole link resets). The waste basket lets you discard a die instead of placing it — 10 dice maximum for the whole game. The sum of the link values sets the final activation difficulty: aim low! Once all six links are made, the final activation decides the game: 2d6 against that difficulty, each failure costing 1 HP and 1 day. Before the first roll, you may sacrifice HP to reduce the difficulty by that amount (once only).

data.name: HelpScoreBody
data.value: Remaining HP + 10 per found construct + 5 per activated construct + 10 per legendary treasure + 5 per link + 5 per crossed skull + 20 per unmodified perfect zero + 10 per unused item. Victory: +50, plus 5 per remaining day.
